mapper.select: SELECT user_id AS id, username, password, avatar_path, email, phone, user_type, created_time, updated_time FROM users WHERE username = #{username}
SELECT user_id AS id, username, password, avatar_path, email, phone, user_type, created_time, updated_time FROM users WHERE username = #{username} AND password = #{password}

SELECT user_id, username, password, avatar_path, email, phone, user_type, created_time, updated_time FROM users WHERE user_id IN
#{userId}
